title: sutherlandia frutescens var. microphylla
intro: Sutherlandia frutescens var. microphylla, also known as the "Cancer Bush" or "Kankerbos," is a plant species native to southern Africa, belonging to the family Pedaliaceae. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various ailments, including cancer, HIV, and tuberculosis, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Sutherlandia frutescens var. microphylla include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, capsules, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
